name: Wilted Cabbage
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it is crisp.
2. Remove the cooked bacon and set it aside.
3. In the same pan, add a little fat left behind by the bacon.
4. Add onion, sugar, vinegar, salt, and pepper to the pan. Stir to combine.
5. Add shredded cabbage to the pan.
6. Cook on medium heat for 15 minutes, uncovered, stirring occasionally.
7. Sprinkle the cooked bacon over the dish before serving.
